specific_question: By October 31, 2025, did Elexion Automotive implement predictive alerts for expiring software licenses across its manufacturing divisions?
answer: Yes. A software management update issued on September 30, 2025 confirmed that predictive alerts were activated across all Elexion Automotive divisions.
